text.title: rag-eval-retrieval-metrics Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-eval-retrieval-metrics application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Are labeled relevant chunk ids available for every test question?

branch.conclusion: Add NDCG to the metric set.
Skip retrieval metrics; use generation metrics only.

example.description: Test set has binary relevance per chunk → P/R/MRR/hit_rate at K=5.
